name: Amphora's Diner Deluxe

notes: Every one of the 101 frozen rows was reconciled independently against the current restaurant-issued 33-page menu and exact-address restaurant-linked FastOrder catalog for 1151 Elden Street in Herndon.

This frozen record represents the same physical venue as osm-amphora-diner-deluxe-152763392. It contains the same 100 underlying rows plus Amphora’s Pick, and 99 of the 100 shared food/PDF rows were incorrectly flattened into the Breakfast category.
Sixteen frozen rows were headings, modifier instructions, description fragments, a photo caption, a shared service rule, or a restaurant promo card rather than menu formulations.
The other 85 frozen rows correspond to 84 current formulations; one collision was a duplicate Lavazza presentation. The frozen record omitted 216 current formulations.
The corrected catalog contains 300 current formulations represented by 320 retained source presentations across 28 categories, with beverage categories after food and bakery categories.

The current restaurant PDF is a full menu, not an allergen matrix. Positive allergens are labeled official-ingredients only when the restaurant-issued formulation text directly names the ingredient or allergen.
The corrected catalog has 174 official-ingredients rows and 126 officially unavailable rows. It makes no item-level may-contain, shared-equipment, or negative safety claims.
The repeated raw-or-undercooked-food advisory was not promoted to item allergens or cross-contact, and optional configurator choices were excluded from fixed-formulation allergens.

Among the 85 real frozen rows, 45 frozen source/allergen records were wrong, 26 positive official claims were verified, and 14 unavailable claims were accurately unavailable; the 16 artifact rows were not applicable.

The frozen extraction over-read PDF headings, option labels, adjacent descriptions, photo text, and the repeated raw-food advisory while omitting most of the live operational catalog and flattening almost every shared row into Breakfast.

The reviewed parser preserves all 296 FastOrder presentations, vendor IDs, option groups, configurability, stock state, prices, descriptions, and categories before consolidating exact duplicate presentations and three naming aliases by formulation.
The official PDF-only Amphora’s Pick row was normalized to Amphora’s Pick 2 at $15.25, with its combo choices preserved as configurable options and optional dairy excluded from fixed allergens.

Twenty focused catalog and reconciliation tests pass. Two identical target-only repair runs produced target SHA-256 26f5f1be3236b2ede31e6842d4c96bf17acd938478b5bf84e85efdba8ba8d53a and preserved all 1,494 non-target records at SHA-256 3f7ced6a2111be3bb2363b7cf13c9ed675260df59c9cce1beef688103096d26d.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Confirmed that this frozen record and the OSM sibling are the same current Amphora Diner Deluxe at 1151 Elden Street in Herndon and followed the current menu and ordering links.
Reused the hash-verified 1,949,427-byte current restaurant PDF after all 33 pages had been extracted and visually reviewed, then rechecked page 14 for Amphora’s Pick 2 and its option boundary.
notes: The PDF is a current full menu and contains no complete allergen matrix or item-level cross-contact disclosure.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Reused the hash-verified exact-address restaurant-linked catalog containing 27 source categories, 296 live presentations, six sold-out presentations, and all option groups and vendor IDs.
notes: FastOrder is current restaurant-linked-vendor menu evidence, not restaurant-issued allergen authority.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Reviewed the current official site, current full-menu PDF, exact-address linked ordering catalog, and retained historical PDFs; no current restaurant-issued allergen matrix or item-level cross-contact disclosure was found.
notes: Only direct positive restaurant-issued formulation terms were retained as official ingredient evidence.

findings.summary: The frozen 101-row record omitted 216 current formulations and did not represent the live exact-address ordering catalog.
findings.resolution: Rebuilt 300 current formulations from all 320 retained presentations and preserved both orderable and current restaurant-PDF-only formulations.

findings.summary: Sixteen frozen rows were non-formulation artifacts, and 99 shared rows were incorrectly flattened into the Breakfast category.
findings.resolution: Quarantined all 16 artifacts and restored the 28 reviewed current categories from the live source surfaces.

findings.summary: The frozen PDF path promoted adjacent text and the repeated raw-food advisory into item allergens; 45 of 85 real frozen rows had wrong source or allergen semantics.
findings.resolution: Limited official claims to direct positive restaurant-issued formulation terms, removed invented may-contain claims, and left unsupported rows officially unavailable.

findings.summary: The frozen row truncated Amphora’s Pick 2, and the first corrected catalog pass missed its non-dotted price line and upward-flowing description.
findings.resolution: Added a focused page-14 boundary for the $15.25 combo, preserved its side and add-on choices, and kept optional dairy out of fixed allergens.

findings.summary: This frozen identifier and osm-amphora-diner-deluxe-152763392 resolve to the same restaurant, address, official page, PDF, ordering vendor, and menu.
findings.resolution: Canonicalized both audited records to the same current Herndon identity and the same independently tested 300-formulation snapshot so their menu and allergen data no longer diverge.

repairs.summary: Removed 16 artifacts, restored 216 omitted formulations, corrected 99 category assignments and 45 source/allergen mismatches, recovered Amphora’s Pick 2, and replaced the frozen row set with the 300-formulation current snapshot.

notes: Current identity: Amphora’s Diner Deluxe, 1151 Elden St, Herndon, VA 20170.
This is a duplicate frozen identifier for the same physical venue as osm-amphora-diner-deluxe-152763392; item reconciliation was still performed independently against all 101 frozen rows.
